command: Maestro is the active app right now. In the Maestro window, find the left sidebar where agents are listed. Right-click on 'Sakur radio' in that sidebar and click Delete from the menu that appears.

result.prompt_sent: Maestro is the active app right now. In the Maestro window, find the left sidebar where agents are listed. Right-click on 'Sakur radio' in that sidebar and click Delete from the menu that appears.
